items.name: url-shortener
items.description: A blazing-fast, asynchronous URL shortener built with Rust (Axum 0.7 & Tokio). Features rigid server-side URL parsing via the url crate, loop-redirection security guards, a low-friction local JSON database engine, and a fluid dark-mode UI with one-click copy-to-clipboard functionality. Zero external database overhead.
